title: Someone knows if the Viz Media manga 3 in 1 is going to be in stock again

wikitext:
[]: Someone knows if the Viz Media manga 3 in 1 is going to be in stock again?             Quote Post by rangure0412 » Thu Jan 06, 2022 10:27 pm I was thinking that for holidays would be stock again, but not.

[]: Re: Someone knows if the Viz Media manga 3 in 1 is going to be in stock again?             Quote Post by heavyR » Fri Jan 07, 2022 8:00 pm They were out for a lot of last year, but finally came back in stock in late October. In stock here: https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/14215 ... UTF8&psc=1
